commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the fallback id regression; final merge still needs branch refresh and human approval-safety acceptance.; Needs attention: The diff touches a security-boundary approval renderer and currently regresses the manual fallback command needed to resolve plugin approvals without buttons.; Review finding: [P1] Use the real approval id in fallback commands — src/infra/plugin-approvals... (sha=a127fcaea76ff73b50367dd98f3e69b2c2a2d75a)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an opt-in `approvals.plugin.language` config, plain/simple plugin approval rendering, Telegram/Matrix/forwarder wiring, docs and generated baseline updates, and broad renderer coverage while intending to preserve `original` as the default.

PR surface: Source +3711, Tests +2783, Docs +10, Generated 0. Total +6504 across 41 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The regression is source-reproducible by comparing current main's `/approve ${request.id}` fallback with the PR head's `/approve <id>` fallback, and the PR tests now expect the placeholder.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the fallback id regression; final merge still needs branch refresh and human approval-safety acceptance.
